videos.title: Cleanest Cable Management Set!
videos.description:
The CableStay is a weighted anchor and silicone-woven cable set that brings color and order to any desk 
 
A 5-foot woven USB-C cable, with up to 60W power delivery, and soft-touch silicone cable anchor, color-matched and built to keep your cable exactly where you left it.

videos.title: Twelve South Valet: Product Overview
videos.description:
http://twelvesouth.com/products/valet

The Twelve South Valet transforms the daily act of charging into a moment of quiet refinement. Crafted with premium materials like supple Nappa leather, it blends the warmth of home design with the precision of modern technology. A timeless essential reinterpreted to hold, charge, and showcase your most valued devices with effortless grace, its quiet elegance brings order and clarity to any home.
